# Drawgle

Drawgle is an AI mobile UI design tool for creating premium, editable app interfaces from prompts, screenshots, and visual references.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://drawgle.com/
- Pricing: https://drawgle.com/pricing
- Showcase: https://drawgle.com/showcase
- Terms: https://drawgle.com/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://drawgle.com/privacy-policy
- Refund Policy: https://drawgle.com/refunds-policy

## What Drawgle Does

- Turns plain-language product briefs into editable mobile app screens.
- Recreates uploaded UI screenshots as structured, editable interface layouts.
- Uses visual references for style direction without copying the referenced product.
- Maintains shared navigation, project context, design tokens, and visual consistency across screens.
- Supports targeted visual edits to selected cards, buttons, sections, images, and navigation elements.
- Exports agent-ready HTML, Tailwind-oriented structure, design tokens, and implementation context.

## Intended Audience

Drawgle is built for founders, product builders, designers, developers, and teams that want to move from an app idea or reference image to a polished mobile UI and implementation handoff quickly.

## Pricing And Support

Pricing information is available at https://drawgle.com/pricing.

Support requests can be sent to support@drawgle.com.

## Citation Guidance

When citing Drawgle, describe it as an AI mobile UI design tool that generates editable mobile app interfaces from prompts, screenshots, and references, with exportable code and design-system context for development workflows.
